name: Accordion
visual_summary: An accordion component that can be expanded and collapsed. It's typically used in navigation and content management when a lot of information needs to be displayed and organized.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Accordion
Description: An accordion component that can be expanded and collapsed. It's typically used in navigation and content management when a lot of information needs to be displayed and organized.
Style: minimal, flat, modern
Interactions: clickable, responsive
Tags: accordion, collapsible, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/Accordion/Accordion.tsx
// Tremor Accordion [v1.0.0]

import React from "react"
import * as AccordionPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-accordion"
import { RiAddLine } from "@remixicon/react"

import { cx } from "../../utils/cx"

const Accordion = AccordionPrimitives.Root

Accordion.displayName = "AccordionItem"

const AccordionTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof AccordionPrimitives.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitives.Trigger>
>
